title: Opec Crudecondensate Loadings Flat As Drop From Saudi Arabia Offset By Other Middle East And Africa 1
section_path: Opec Crudecondensate Loadings Flat As Drop From Saudi Arabia Offset By Other Middle East And Africa 1
section_path_text: Opec Crudecondensate Loadings Flat As Drop From Saudi Arabia Offset By Other Middle East And Africa 1
summary:
Main
By Jay Maroo
Total OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings in October stood at around 29.5, of which OPEC Middle East's contributed 18.5mbd - both totals show little change from September. But within the Middle East, the m-o-m change in Saudi loadings showed a sharp contrast to those elsewhere in the region. OPEC+ crude/condensate loadings by region (mbd)
Saudi loadings fell by 570kbd on the month in October, the largest drop observed since March 2022.
